calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:11 pm and concluding at 2:19 pm

Plaintiff Bankers Healthcare Group, LLC appearing represented by Richard Weiner, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jessica M. Yeeting not appearing.

DANIEL JOHNSTON is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff submitts proposed order to the Court for the use of copies of promissory note in lieu of originals.

The Court GRANTS and signs Plaintiff's proposed Order for the use of copies of promissory note in lieu of originals.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bankers Healthcare Group, LLC., and against Defendant Jessica M. Yeeting aka Jessica Marie Yeeting, aka Jessica M. Ramos as follows:

1. Damages: $52,530.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $6,719.63
3. Attorney's Fees: $4,225.00
4. Costs: $761.65

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $64,236.28
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
